output.dependency: The diagnosis/outcome label column (e.g., pneumonia) determines the naming/namespace of the associated code column, which uses a structured code format with the disease category embedded (e.g., pn-3b, pn-4).

The structured code value specifies the exact clinical measure description in the accompanying text column (the code pn-3b corresponds to the blood-culture timing measure; pn-4 corresponds to smoking-cessation counseling).
The city/location column is constrained by the state/region code column; city values correspond to their associated state values (e.g., Birmingham aligns with AL).

The street-address column appears paired with an additional address/neighborhood field; the placeholder/empty value indicates that when the primary street address is present, the auxiliary address component may be omitted or standardized.

The organization/payment-type column (e.g., voluntary non-profit - private) semantically determines the categorical indicator column (e.g., yes/no eligibility/status aligned with that organizational type).

The healthcare setting/type column (e.g., acute care hospitals) is related to the ownership/payment-type classification; the facility type category constrains the plausible values of the organization-type category.
